ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game was played in */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, exhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game this play belongs to */,
  "half" INTEGER /* Half of the game (1 or 2) */,
  "time_remaining_half" TEXT /* Time remaining in the half when the play occurred */,
  "secs_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., shot, pass, rebound) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot attempt */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated play */,
  "shot_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the shot */,
  "shot_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the shot */,
  "shot_team" TEXT /* Team taking the shot */,
  "shot_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the shot (e.g., made, missed) */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., layup, jumper, three-pointer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeouts" (
  "timeout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeout */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game this timeout belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team calling the timeout */,
  "remaining_time" TEXT /* Remaining time after the timeout */,
  "timeout_type" TEXT /* Type of timeout (e.g., full, 30-second, 20-second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeouts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "win_probabilities" (
  "prob_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the win probability record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team for which the win probability is calculated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time at which the probability was recorded */,
  "win_prob" REAL /* Win probability for the team */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the win probability calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prob_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_probabilities_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring statistic record */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the play */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the play */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made during the play */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected during the play */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals during the play */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks during the play */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers during the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scoring_stats_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds collected by the team */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "total_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the team */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possession_details" (
  "possession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the possession record */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the play during which possession changed */,
  "possession_before" TEXT /* Team with possession before the play */,
  "possession_after" TEXT /* Team with possession after the play */,
  "possession_reason" TEXT /* Reason for possession change (e.g., rebound, steal, turnover) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("possession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possession_details_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive, rehab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_from" TEXT /* Team the player transferred from */,
  "transfer_to" TEXT /* Team the player transferred to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_info" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the draft record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_info_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
